patch.value:
# Story — Beyond-PM domains on pm SDK primitives

As a **platform developer**, I can model a **non-PM domain system** — for example a git-like version-control workflow (changesets, refs, merges) or a company's business processes (approvals, invoicing, HR flows) — using **only public pm SDK primitives**, so the SDK proves itself as a universal, event-sourced application platform rather than a PM-only toolkit.

## Why
The product vision (ADR pm-oxq5) states the SDK should be extensible enough to build "an entire SCV like Git or entire companies and their business logic". Today every SDK story/exemplar (pm-w89s, pm-cbwg) stays inside the PM domain. Nothing exercises — or even inventories — the primitive set a foreign domain needs: fully custom item types and status graphs, domain verbs via extension commands, transactional multi-item mutations, event-sourced history replay as domain state, and hooks as business rules.

## Scope (exploration story, horizon 5)
- Inventory the primitive gaps: which SDK capabilities does a non-PM domain need that the promoted primitive set (pm-rjqr/pm-98cz/pm-3mna/pm-4a7m et al.) does not yet expose?
- Feed each gap back as a concrete SDK item under pm-usfg (create-only, dedupe-checked).
- Acceptance is demonstrated by the exemplar spike child, not by shipping a production VCS.

## Out of scope
Building a real VCS or ERP; performance parity with git; any core storage change (scale work belongs to pm-9rxu).

## Sequencing
After the PM-domain exemplar pm-cbwg proves the custom-PM-tool story, and after the schema/config SDK promotion pm-3mna. Parked at P4 with pm-is1a (federation) in horizon 5.
As a platform developer, I can build a non-PM domain system (e.g. a git-like VCS or a company's business workflows) using only pm SDK primitives

Horizon-5 exploration story: prove the pm SDK is a universal event-sourced application platform, not a PM-only toolkit. Inventories the primitive gaps a foreign domain exposes and feeds them back as concrete SDK items. Dedupe-checked 2026-07-06: pm search for VCS/business-logic/beyond-PM coverage found only the vision ADR pm-oxq5 and PM-domain stories pm-w89s/pm-cbwg; no item tracks the beyond-PM ambition.

Primitive-gap inventory exists for at least one non-PM domain; every gap is filed as an individual dedupe-checked SDK item under pm-usfg or explicitly waived; exemplar spike child demonstrates the story end-to-end
